# room.d

```ts
import { MessageFns } from "../../../baseType";
export declare const protobufPackage = "Room";
export declare enum RoomErrorCode {
    /** SUCCESS - 正常成功进房 */
    SUCCESS = 0,
    /** SUCCESS_ENCOUNTER_MISS - 进房成功，但encounter不存在 */
    SUCCESS_ENCOUNTER_MISS = 1,
    /** SUCCESS_FRIEND_LEAVE - 进房成功，但friend 离开 */
    SUCCESS_FRIEND_LEAVE = 2,
    /** FAIL - 进房失败 */
    FAIL = 10,
    /** FAIL_IN_BLACKLIST - 踢人 黑名单 */
    FAIL_IN_BLACKLIST = 11,
    /** FAIL_MAX_PLAYER_LIMIT - 最大的玩家 */
    FAIL_MAX_PLAYER_LIMIT = 12,
    /** FAIL_ROOM_NOT_EXIST - 房间不存在 */
    FAIL_ROOM_NOT_EXIST = 13,
    /** FAIL_FRIEND_OFFLINE - 进房失败，好友不在线了 */
    FAIL_FRIEND_OFFLINE = 14,
    /** FAIL_NO_PERMISSION - 私有房鉴权失败 */
    FAIL_NO_PERMISSION = 15,
    UNRECOGNIZED = -1
}
export declare function roomErrorCodeFromJSON(object: any): RoomErrorCode;
export declare function roomErrorCodeToJSON(object: RoomErrorCode): string;
export declare enum Platform {
    UNKNOWN = 0,
    IOS = 1,
    /** ANDROID - other eg: WEB.. */
    ANDROID = 2,
    UNRECOGNIZED = -1
}
export declare function platformFromJSON(object: any): Platform;
export declare function platformToJSON(object: Platform): string;
/** 进入房间错误码 对应S2C_EnterRoom */
export declare enum EnterRoomErrorCode {
    ENTER_ROOM_SUCCESS = 0,
    ENTER_ROOM_FAILED = 1,
    ENTER_ROOM_FAILED_MAX_COUNT = 2,
    UNRECOGNIZED = -1
}
export declare function enterRoomErrorCodeFromJSON(object: any): EnterRoomErrorCode;
export declare function enterRoomErrorCodeToJSON(object: EnterRoomErrorCode): string;
/** 游戏状态id列表 及说明 */
export declare enum GameStatusId {
    /** NOT_READY - 还未足够三个人 */
    NOT_READY = 0,
    /** READY_WAITING_START - 已经够3个人，等待30s 或者 有人点击开始，此时可以发送，开始游戏按钮 */
    READY_WAITING_START = 1,
    /** START_AND_INIT - 游戏已经开始，发牌后三十秒进入下一个状态 */
    START_AND_INIT = 2,
    /** PLAYER_SELECT_CARD - 玩家选牌阶段 30s倒计时 */
    PLAYER_SELECT_CARD = 3,
    /** CZAR_SELECT_CARD - 裁判 选牌阶段 30s倒计时 */
    CZAR_SELECT_CARD = 4,
    /** WAITING_FOR_NEXT_ROUND - 裁判选择完牌，通知给 玩家后，等待下一轮 30倒计时 */
    WAITING_FOR_NEXT_ROUND = 5,
    UNRECOGNIZED = -1
}
export declare function gameStatusIdFromJSON(object: any): GameStatusId;
export declare function gameStatusIdToJSON(object: GameStatusId): string;

export interface UserInfo {
    userId?: number | undefined;
    userName?: string | undefined;
    userGender?: number | undefined;
    avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
    avatarId?: string | undefined;
    /** 新增的mmoStatus */
    mmoStatus?: MMOStatus | undefined;
    /** 首次设置的默认avatarId */
    firstAvatarId?: string | undefined;
}
export interface UserStatus {
    userId?: number | undefined;
    userPosX?: number | undefined;
    userPosY?: number | undefined;
    userPosZ?: number | undefined;
    userRotX?: number | undefined;
    userRotY?: number | undefined;
    /**
     * int32 userFaceX = 8;
     * 	int32 userFaceY = 9;
     * 	int32 userFaceZ = 10;
     */
    userRotZ?: number | undefined;
}
/** 客户端传来的手机信息 */
export interface PhoneInfo {
    platform?: Platform | undefined;
}
/** 进入房间 */
export interface C2SEnterRoom {
    /** 用户id */
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    user?: UserStatus | undefined;
    userInfo?: UserInfo | undefined;
    phoneInfo?: PhoneInfo | undefined;
    /** encounter的Id */
    encounterId?: string | undefined;
    /** 好友Id */
    friendId?: number | undefined;
    /**
     * 会话邀请进房
     * 如果房间的权限是 public，则不用 inviteToken
     * 如果房间权限是 private，则inviteToken 填写为 房主的id
     */
    inviteToken?: number | undefined;
}
/** 进入房间 返回的消息 */
export interface S2CEnterRoom {
    /** 结果状态码 */
    result?: number | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的Id号 */
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的用户 id列表 */
    userInfoList?: UserInfo[] | undefined;
    userStatusList?: UserStatus[] | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的椅子列表 */
    seatList?: Seat[] | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的 沙发列表 */
    sofaList?: Sofa[] | undefined;
    /** 玩家的肩膀信息 */
    userShoulderList?: UserStatus[] | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的房主id */
    roomInfo?: RoomData | undefined;
}
/** 其他用户进入房间的 单一广播消息 */
export interface S2CBroadCastEnterRoom {
    /** 结果状态码 */
    result?: number | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的Id号 */
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    /** 当前房间的用户 id列表 */
    userInfo?: UserInfo | undefined;
    /** 新进入房间的用户状态 */
    userStatus?: UserStatus | undefined;
}
/** 离开房间 */
export interface C2SLeaveRoom {
    /** 用户Id */
    playerId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CLeaveRoom {
    /** 返回确认码 */
    result?: number | undefined;
    playerId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadCastLeaveRoom {
    /** 返回确认码 */
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    /** 可能换房主了 0 */
    ownerId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 房间同步当前的用户状态 */
export interface C2SSyncMessage {
    /** 房间号 */
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    /** 同步用户消息 */
    user?: UserStatus | undefined;
}
/**
 * 房间 同步 当前用户状态的回包 确认
 * 当前用户会收到 S2C_SyncMessage
 * 其他用户会收到 S2C_BroadCastSyncMessage
 */
export interface S2CSyncMessage {
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    user?: UserStatus | undefined;
}
/** 房间内 同步广播所有人的消息 */
export interface S2CBroadCastSyncMessage {
    users?: UserStatus[] | undefined;
}
/** 游戏状态 */
export interface GameStatus {
    /** 对应 GameStatusIds */
    gameStatusId?: GameStatusId | undefined;
    /** 距离当前状态结束剩余的秒数(s) -1 默认无限 */
    leftTime?: number | undefined;
    /** 服务器发送该时间的时间戳 */
    sendTime?: number | undefined;
}
/** 超时，或者全部选择完成后，需要单独广播游戏状态的协议 */
export interface S2CBroadCastGameStatus {
    gameStatus?: GameStatus | undefined;
}
/** 椅子坐下 */
export interface C2SSitSeat {
    seatId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 椅子坐下的回包 */
export interface S2CSitSeat {
    result?: SeatResultCode | undefined;
    gameStatus?: GameStatus | undefined;
}
/** 离开椅子 */
export interface C2SLeaveSeat {
    seatId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 离开椅子 */
export interface S2CLeaveSeat {
    result?: SeatResultCode | undefined;
}
/** 椅子状态有变化，广播椅子状态 */
export interface S2CBroadCastSeatStatus {
    /** 每个椅子的状态 */
    seatList?: Seat[] | undefined;
}
/** 椅子 */
export interface Seat {
    id?: number | undefined;
    status?: SeatStatus | undefined;
    playerId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 开始游戏 按钮 满三个人， 任何人可以点击开始按钮 可以开始 */
export interface C2SStartGame {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 给当前玩家的回复确认信息 */
export interface S2CStartGame {
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
}
/** 点击开始游戏后，初始化广播的协议，后面每经过一轮 */
export interface S2CBroadCastGameReady {
    /** 当前用户的角色身份 是裁判 还是 玩家 */
    role?: Role | undefined;
    /** 当前游戏数据 */
    score?: number | undefined;
    /** 本轮黑牌 */
    blackCard?: Card | undefined;
    /** 当前用户的白牌卡牌列表 */
    cardList?: Card[] | undefined;
    /** 裁判的 playerId */
    czarPlayerId?: number | undefined;
    playerStatList?: PlayerGameStat[] | undefined;
}
/** 玩家的游戏数据 */
export interface PlayerGameStat {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    score?: number | undefined;
}
/** 当前玩家 从手里卡组选择一张卡牌 */
export interface C2SSelectCard {
    cardId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 回复 选择结果，与剩余卡牌，如果超时未收到选择卡牌的，则直接发下面的协议 */
export interface S2CSelectCard {
    /** 结果状态码 */
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
    /** 当前玩家-剩余的卡牌列表，此时不会补齐卡牌 */
    cardId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 该消息广播给所有玩家玩家选择牌的状态 */
export interface S2CBroadCastPlayerSelectCard {
    card?: Card[] | undefined;
}
/** 裁判揭牌 */
export interface C2SCzarOpenCard {
    cardId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CCzarOpenCard {
    result?: number | undefined;
    cardId?: number | undefined;
}
/**
 * 广播给其他玩家 当前揭牌
 * 如果当前裁判始终未选择牌，则广播所有牌
 * 裁判点选的时候 广播一张牌
 */
export interface S2CBroadCastOpenCard {
    cardId?: number[] | undefined;
}
/** 裁判 选择本轮获胜的玩家 */
export interface C2SCzarSelectWinCard {
    cardId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 回复 选择结果，与剩余卡牌，如果超时未收到选择卡牌的，则直接发下面的协议 */
export interface S2CCzarSelectWinCard {
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
    cardId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 广播给所有玩家 谁赢了 */
export interface S2CBroadcastCzarWinCard {
    winCardId?: number | undefined;
    winPlayerId?: number | undefined;
    /** 当前的赢的玩家的分数 */
    score?: number | undefined;
}
/** 卡牌的数据 */
export interface Card {
    cardId?: number | undefined;
    /** 卡牌的类型 黑牌 还是 白牌 */
    type?: CardType | undefined;
    /** 卡牌的内容 */
    content?: string | undefined;
    /** 从哪个玩家选出的 - 广播给裁判的时候用的 */
    fromPlayerId?: number | undefined;
    /** 选牌之后 是否被裁判打开 */
    isOpen?: boolean | undefined;
}
/** 同步 bs 消息 */
export interface C2SSyncBlendShape {
    /** 用户id */
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    /** bs数组 */
    bs?: number[] | undefined;
}
/** 待优化，需要同时同步多个人的bs信息 */
export interface S2CSyncBlendShape {
    /** 结果状态码 */
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
    /** bs数组 */
    bs?: number[] | undefined;
}
/** 广播bs */
export interface S2CBroadcastSyncBlendShape {
    users?: UserBlendShape[] | undefined;
}
export interface UserBlendShape {
    /** 用户Id */
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    /** bs数组 */
    bs?: number[] | undefined;
}
export interface HeadStatus {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    headRotX?: number | undefined;
    headRotY?: number | undefined;
    headRotZ?: number | undefined;
}
export interface C2SSyncHeadStatus {
    headStatus?: HeadStatus | undefined;
}
export interface S2CSyncHeadStatus {
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
    headStatus?: HeadStatus | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadcastSyncHeadStatus {
    headStatus?: HeadStatus[] | undefined;
}
/** 这两个是心跳包 */
export interface C2SHeartBeat {
    index?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CHeartBeat {
    index?: number | undefined;
}
/** 沙发坐下 */
export interface C2SSitSofa {
    sofaId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 沙发坐下的回包 */
export interface S2CSitSofa {
    result?: SofaResultCode | undefined;
}
/** 离开沙发 */
export interface C2SLeaveSofa {
    sofaId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 离开沙发 */
export interface S2CLeaveSofa {
    result?: SofaResultCode | undefined;
}
/** 沙发状态有变化，广播沙发状态 */
export interface S2CBroadCastSofaStatus {
    /** 每个沙发的状态 */
    sofaList?: Sofa[] | undefined;
}
/** 椅子 */
export interface Sofa {
    id?: number | undefined;
    status?: SofaStatus | undefined;
    playerId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface C2SVoiceInfo {
    data?: VoiceMsg | undefined;
}
export interface S2CVoiceInfo {
    result?: VoiceErrorCode | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadcastVoiceInfo {
    data?: VoiceMsg[] | undefined;
}
/** 声音实体 */
export interface VoiceMsg {
    /** user id */
    uid?: number | undefined;
    /** [0-255] */
    volume?: number | undefined;
    /** The activity status of remote users */
    vad?: number | undefined;
}
/** 强制下一轮 */
export interface C2SForceNextRound {
}
export interface S2CForceNextRound {
    result?: ForceNextRoundResultCode | undefined;
    /** 已经同意下一轮的 玩家人数 */
    agreePlayerCount?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadcastForceNextRound {
    agreePlayerCount?: number | undefined;
}
/** 同步肩膀消息 */
export interface C2SSyncShoulder {
    shoulderInfo?: UserStatus | undefined;
}
export interface S2CSyncShoulder {
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadcastShoulder {
    shoulderInfoLst?: UserStatus[] | undefined;
}
/** 同步手部消息 */
export interface C2SSyncHand {
    handInfo?: UserHandTrackingInfo | undefined;
}
export interface S2CSyncHand {
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadcastHand {
    handInfoLst?: UserHandTrackingInfo[] | undefined;
}
export interface UserHandTrackingInfo {
    /** 玩家id */
    uid?: number | undefined;
    thumbFlexionAngle?: number | undefined;
    indexFlexionAngle?: number | undefined;
    middleFlexionAngle?: number | undefined;
    ringFlexionAngle?: number | undefined;
    littleFlexionAngle?: number | undefined;
    handWristPosX?: number | undefined;
    handWristPosY?: number | undefined;
    handWristPosZ?: number | undefined;
    handWristRotX?: number | undefined;
    handWristRotY?: number | undefined;
    handWristRotZ?: number | undefined;
    isRightHand?: boolean | undefined;
    isHandInCamera?: boolean | undefined;
}
export interface C2SChangeAvatar {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    avatarId?: string | undefined;
    /** 未来可能不用？ */
    avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
}
export interface S2CChangeAvatar {
    result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
}
/**
 * TODO:
 * 这里 临时广播给自己一下 不走鉴权
 */
export interface S2CBroadCastChangeAvatar {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    avatarId?: string | undefined;
    avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
}
export interface C2SAgoraToken {
    /** token role */
    role?: number | undefined;
    uid?: number | undefined;
    channelName?: string | undefined;
}
export interface S2CAgoraToken {
    token?: string | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
}
/** 创建房间的协议 */
export interface C2SCreateRoom {
    roomInfo?: RoomData | undefined;
}
export interface S2CCreateRoom {
    /** 创建房间结果码 */
    result?: CreateRoomErrorCode | undefined;
    /** 房间id */
    roomId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface RoomData {
    /** 创建的时候不用传 */
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    /** 创建的时候必要 */
    premadeId?: string | undefined;
    /** 创建的时候 不传 默认 20 */
    maxUser?: number | undefined;
    /** 创建的时候 必要 */
    roomTitle?: string | undefined;
    /** 房主id */
    ownerId?: number | undefined;
    /** 创建的时候 必要 */
    permission?: RoomPermissiion | undefined;
}
/** 房间内踢人的逻辑 */
export interface C2SKickOut {
    /** 要踢的玩家 */
    kickPlayerId?: number | undefined;
    /** 踢人踢多久，不传的话，默认1h, 默认是传 秒(second) */
    expireTime?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CKickOut {
    /** 踢的结果 */
    result?: KickErrorCode | undefined;
}
/** 发给被踢人的消息 */
export interface S2CForceKickOut {
    /** 被 房主剔除房间了 */
    ownerId?: number | undefined;
}
/**
 * 这个会强制 服务器针对这个玩家发起一个推流
 * for dev
 */
export interface C2SFakeStartEncounter {
    /**
     * fakeEncounter中的玩家Id列表
     * 包含当前玩家的Id*
     * 多个玩家，才可以模拟reAnchor*
     */
    playerIds?: number[] | undefined;
    /** 指定的 anchor的 玩家id */
    anchorId?: number | undefined;
}
/**
 * 正常情况下，服务器主动推下这个消息
 * 重新更换anchor的情况下 也发这个消息
 */
export interface S2CStartEncounter {
    /** 当前的encounter 信息 */
    encounterInfo?: EncounterEntity | undefined;
    /** 是否是二次发起的 将Anchor 从last client -> current client */
    isReAnchor?: boolean | undefined;
    /**
     * 当前客户端是anchor的情况下(已经推流中)，
     * 如果当前 encounter 信息有更新的话 则为true
     */
    isUpdate?: boolean | undefined;
    /** premadeId */
    premadeId?: string | undefined;
    /** encounter 开始时间 */
    startTime?: number | undefined;
}
/**
 * 客户端 需要给服务器回复ack一下，如果ack时间超过阈值，则会自动更换下一个
 * 待定?
 */
export interface C2SStartEncounter {
    isSuccess?: boolean | undefined;
}
/** 相同encounter，更换camera的逻辑 */
export interface C2SReAnchor {
    /** 之前的encounterId */
    encounterId?: string | undefined;
}
export interface S2CReAnchor {
    result?: ReAnchorErrorCode | undefined;
}
export interface EncounterEntity {
    /** 当前发起的encounterId */
    encounterId?: string | undefined;
    /** 当前 房间内所有玩家的列表 */
    players?: EncounterUserInfo[] | undefined;
    /** 当前encounter的 坐标值 */
    encounterX?: number | undefined;
    encounterY?: number | undefined;
    encounterZ?: number | undefined;
}
export interface EncounterUserInfo {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    enterRoomTime?: number | undefined;
}
/**
 * TODO:
 * 后面做成通用消息
 */
export interface C2SFollowNotify {
    /** 发给哪个玩家 */
    toPlayerId?: number | undefined;
    /** 自定义消息 内容 */
    followMsg?: string | undefined;
}
/** 给发起者的回包 */
export interface S2CFollowNotify {
    result?: FollowNotifyResult | undefined;
}
/** 发送给 被follow的玩家消息 */
export interface S2CBroadcastFollowNotify {
    /** 发给哪个玩家 */
    fromPlayer?: UserInfo | undefined;
    /** 自定义消息 内容 */
    followMsg?: string | undefined;
}
/** 发起MMO 状态 */
export interface C2SChangeMMOStatus {
    mmoStatus?: MMOStatus | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadCastMMOStatus {
    playerId?: number | undefined;
    mmoStatus?: MMOStatus | undefined;
}
/** 数据统计 encounter观看人数 */
export interface C2SStatEncounter {
    /** encounterId */
    encounterId?: string | undefined;
    /** 当前统计的动作类型 */
    actionType?: StatType | undefined;
    /**
     * 当前统计的值 +1的这种 可以不填该值，按请求记次
     * 浮点数 取整上报
     */
    statValue?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CStatEncounter {
    result?: StatEncounterErrorCode | undefined;
}
/** 定时 推送 */
export interface S2CRoomWatching {
    watchCount?: number | undefined;
    /** 观看者Id列表(超过100 只会按照100发送) */
    watcherLst?: number[] | undefined;
}
/** 统计元数据 */
export interface C2SStatEncounterMeta {
    /** encounterId - 不是全场景都需要 */
    encounterId?: string | undefined;
    /** 当前统计的动作类型 */
    actionType?: StatType | undefined;
    /**
     * 当前统计的值 +1的这种 可以不填该值，按请求记次
     * 浮点数 取整上报
     */
    statValue?: number | undefined;
}
/** 统计元数据 */
export interface S2CStatEncounterMeta {
    result?: StatEncounterErrorCode | undefined;
}
/** 统计发过文字聊天的消息，需要上报 */
export interface C2SSyncChat {
    /** 当前聊天的 对方id */
    playerId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface S2CSyncChat {
    result?: SyncChatResultCode | undefined;
}
/** 开始匹配 */
export interface C2SStartMatch {
    /** 当前用户block的数据 */
    blockPlayerIds?: number[] | undefined;
    /** 当前用户被block的用户Id */
    blockByIds?: number[] | undefined;
    /** client pass seqNum */
    seqNum?: number | undefined;
    /** 匹配类型，旧版本 */
    filterType?: MatchFilterType | undefined;
}
export interface S2CStartMatch {
    result?: StartMatchResultCode | undefined;
    /** 如果匹配失败 则该id 传0 */
    matchPlayerId?: number | undefined;
    /** client pass seqNum */
    seqNum?: number | undefined;
    isOnline?: boolean | undefined;
}
export interface C2SCancelMatch {
}
export interface S2CCancelMatch {
    result?: CancelMatchResultCode | undefined;
}
/**
 * 邀请卡进房的逻辑
 * 双方都可以发
 */
export interface C2SInviteJoinRoom {
    /** 进房的房间数据 */
    roomData?: RoomData | undefined;
    /** 邀请卡的唯一id */
    inviteCardId?: string | undefined;
}
export interface S2CInviteJoinRoom {
    /** 结果 */
    result?: InviteJoinRoomErrorCode | undefined;
    /** 邀请卡唯一Id */
    inviteCardId?: string | undefined;
    /** 房间Id */
    roomId?: number | undefined;
}
/** 批量获取 邀请房间的信息 */
export interface C2SInviteRoomInfo {
    inviteCardIds?: string[] | undefined;
}
export interface S2CInviteRoomInfo {
    roomInfos?: InviteRoomInfo[] | undefined;
}
export interface InviteRoomInfo {
    inviteCardId?: string | undefined;
    roomStatus?: InviteRoomStatus | undefined;
}
export interface C2SNormalRoomInfo {
    roomIds?: number[] | undefined;
}
export interface S2CNormalRoomInfo {
    roomData?: NormalRoomStatus[] | undefined;
}
export interface NormalRoomStatus {
    roomId?: number | undefined;
    isAlive?: boolean | undefined;
}
export interface C2SUpdateRoomInfo {
    /** 当前版本只用permission即可 */
    roomData?: RoomData | undefined;
}
export interface S2CUpdateRoomInfo {
    result?: UpdateRoomInfoErrorCode | undefined;
}
export interface S2CBroadcastUpdateRoomInfo {
    /** 当前版本只用permission即可 */
    roomData?: RoomData | undefined;
}
/** 设置匹配过滤的配置，每次变更的时候调用 */
export interface C2SSetMatchFilterType {
    filterType?: MatchFilterType | undefined;
}
export interface S2CSetMatchFilterType {
    result?: FilterTypeErrorCode | undefined;
}
/**
 * 获取上次设置的匹配类型
 * 检测本地没有 cache的时候，获取一次
 * 其他情况以本地为准
 */
export interface C2SGetMatchFilterType {
}
export interface S2CGetMatchFilterType {
    filterType?: MatchFilterType | undefined;
}
/** 3D视频协议 */
export interface VideoConfig {
    videoUrl?: string | undefined;
    currentTime?: number | undefined;
    isPlay?: boolean | undefined;
}
/** 客户端设置 3d视频配置，只有房主发起 */
export interface C2SSet3DVideoConfig {
    videoConfig?: VideoConfig | undefined;
}
/** 设置结果 */
export interface S2CSet3DVideoConfig {
    isSuccess?: boolean | undefined;
}
/** 房主每变更一次，则进行广播一次 */
export interface S2CBroadcast3DVideoConfig {
    videoConfig?: VideoConfig | undefined;
}
/** 进入房间，动态加载当前房间的播放配置 */
export interface C2SGet3DVideoConfig {
}
/** 返回当前的播放配置 */
export interface S2CGet3DVideoConfig {
    videoConfig?: VideoConfig | undefined;
}
```
